name: Always True Condition
description: Detects always-true numeric conditions like OR 1=1, OR 2=2

name: SQL Comment Bypass
description: Detects SQL comment sequences used to bypass query logic

name: DROP TABLE
description: Blocks any attempt to drop database tables

name: DROP DATABASE
description: Blocks any attempt to drop entire databases

name: EXEC Command
description: Blocks EXEC/EXECUTE commands that can run stored procedures

name: xp_cmdshell
description: Blocks xp_cmdshell which can execute OS commands

name: SLEEP / Blind SQLi
description: Detects time-based blind SQL injection techniques

name: LOAD_FILE / INTO OUTFILE
description: Blocks file read/write operations through SQL

name: Hex Encoding Attack
description: Detects hex-encoded strings or CHAR() obfuscation used to bypass filters

name: Information Schema Probe
description: Blocks queries probing database metadata via information_schema

name: SQLite Master Table Probe
description: Blocks attempts to read SQLite internal schema table
